title: rosa agrestis subvar. belnensis
intro: Rosa agrestis subvar. belnensis, also known as wild rose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Rosa agrestis subvar. belnensis include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
